title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on Central Bank of India
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated March 23, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹63.60 lakh (Rupees Sixty Three Lakh Sixty Thousand only) on Central Bank of India (the bank) for non-compliance with certain provisions of directions issued by RBI on ‘Know Your Customer (KYC)’ and ‘Financial lnclusion - Access to Banking Services - Basic Savings Bank Deposit Account (BSBDA)'. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under the
